news.title: Regents recognize Mnookin’s service, contributions
news.summary_en: The Universities of Wisconsin Board of Regents recognized UW–Madison Chancellor Jennifer Mnookin for her leadership ahead of her upcoming departure for Columbia University.

news.title: The start of Terrace season
news.summary_en: After a long winter, the sunburst chairs are back on the Memorial Union Terrace.

news.title: A UW professor’s book tells the overlooked tale of a queer Black man who risked his life during WWII for love
news.summary_en: Ethelene Whitmire’s ‘The Remarkable Life of Reed Peggram,’ who survived and escaped a Nazi concentration camp with his lover, has received national recognition since its release.
